leads.title: Merchandise & Operations
leads.signal: Ongoing partner — custom merch and team apparel.
leads.notes: CHL (QMJHL) team. One of Apollo's flagship clients. Annual renewal opportunity.

leads.title: Operations
leads.signal: Active partner — custom team apparel.
leads.notes: QMJHL team based in Moncton, NB. Strong partnership. Key for NB market presence.

leads.title: Operations
leads.signal: Active partner — team and fan apparel.
leads.notes: QMJHL team in Sydney, NS. Good relationship. Opportunity to expand fan merch line.

leads.title: GM / Operations
leads.signal: QMJHL team not yet in Apollo's roster — strong collab potential.
leads.notes: PEI-based QMJHL franchise. Apollo's coastal brand resonates with island identity. Outreach opportunity.

leads.title: Merchandise
leads.signal: QMJHL team in Saint John, NB — natural extension of Wildcats relationship.
leads.notes: Major junior team, strong fan base. Apollo's NB presence via Wildcats is a credibility play here.

leads.title: Director of Athletics
leads.signal: Existing university partner — continue and expand.
leads.notes: AUS member school. Opportunity to leverage for wider AUS network intro.

leads.title: Athletics Coordinator
leads.signal: Major Halifax university — large student body = big merch opportunity.
leads.notes: Dal Tigers athletics program. Over 18,000 students. Custom spirit wear and team apparel target.

leads.title: Athletics Director
leads.signal: Wolfpack athletics — strong campus culture, good merch audience.
leads.notes: Wolfville, NS. Strong sports culture. Apollo coastal-heritage angle plays well here.

leads.title: Marketing
leads.signal: NS craft brewery — strong local identity, merch-forward brand culture.
leads.notes: Shelburne, NS. Known for local culture and sea-themed branding. Perfect collab profile for Apollo.

leads.title: Brand Manager
leads.signal: Halifax institution — large merch program, cultural credibility.
leads.notes: One of NS's biggest craft breweries. Located Halifax waterfront. Regular merch drops and event apparel.

leads.title: Events Coordinator
leads.signal: Growing Halifax brewery with active events and merch line.
leads.notes: Halifax-based craft brewery with strong community presence. Merch drops align with Apollo's aesthetic.

leads.title: Events & Partnerships
leads.signal: Major arts festival — premium event apparel opportunity.
leads.notes: Arts and culture festival. Not strictly Atlantic Canada but relevant for festival apparel pipeline building.

leads.title: Director
leads.signal: Music festival collab — strong cultural fit.
leads.notes: Existing festival partner. Seasonal opportunity — start 2026 lineup conversations now.

leads.title: Festival Operations
leads.signal: Major Atlantic music festival — annual merch program sourced locally.
leads.notes: One of Canada's top jazz festivals. Local sourcing is important to their brand. Strong Apollo pitch angle.

leads.title: Owner
leads.signal: Regional gym brand — staff uniforms and branded merch opportunity.
leads.notes: Multi-location Atlantic gym chain. Staff apparel + member merch = recurring revenue.

leads.title: Regional Manager
leads.signal: Large gym chain — regional staff uniform contracts.
leads.notes: Multiple locations in HRM and across NS. Staff uniform procurement done regionally. Volume play.

leads.title: Ops / Merch
leads.signal: CPL soccer club — fan merch and lifestyle apparel opportunity.
leads.notes: Canadian Premier League team. Growing fan base. Apollo's heritage-coastal aesthetic pairs well with the club's identity.

leads.title: GM / Operations
leads.signal: Existing team partner.
leads.notes: MHL team. Apollo's existing relationship. Opportunity to deepen and get referrals to other MHL teams.

leads.title: GM
leads.signal: MHL team — Apollo's Crushers relationship opens door.
leads.notes: MHL Nova Scotia team. Use Pictou County relationship as a referral entry point.

leads.title: Operations Manager
leads.signal: Indigenous-led sports facility — cultural collab + apparel opportunity.
leads.notes: Cape Breton. Membertou is a forward-thinking Mi'kmaw community enterprise. Apollo's cultural pride branding resonates strongly. Strong collab story.

leads.title: GM / Operations
leads.signal: Missing QMJHL Atlantic team — Apollo covers 3 of 4, Titan is the gap.
leads.notes: NB-based QMJHL franchise. Apollo already works with Mooseheads, Eagles, and Wildcats. Titan completes the QMJHL Atlantic sweep. Strong pitch: 'we supply your rivals, let us supply you.' Bathurst/Acadie market is passionate hockey country.

leads.title: Festival Director / Operations
leads.signal: 29th annual NSMW confirmed for Truro, Nov 12–15 — merchandise sourcing window open now.
leads.notes: Just announced March 3, 2026. Four-day festival, conference, and awards show. Official event merch (volunteer shirts, artist packs, fan gear) is sourced Q2–Q3. Apollo's cultural DNA + NS music roots = perfect fit. Ben's media network (Advocate, Saltscapes) may have a warm intro to Music Nova Scotia.

leads.title: Events / Partnerships
leads.signal: Annual music + food + drink festival at Cavendish Beach, PEI — Sept 11–12, 2026.
leads.notes: Growing PEI coastal festival. Apollo's coastal-heritage aesthetic is a perfect brand match. Opportunity: official event apparel or collab merch drop (Apollo x Sommo). PEI market is underserved in Apollo's current footprint — this is a beachhead. Pitch spring 2026 for Sept production lead time.
